title: viola × burnatii
intro: Viola × burnatii, also known as Burnat's violet or hybrid violet, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Viola, resulting from the cross between Viola odorata and Viola persica. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola × burnatii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Viola × burnatii are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, and then using them to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
